ceo.title: CEO Message
ceo.subtitle: A message from the CEO of Ducksung Techpack
ceo.name: CEO Hong Gil-dong
ceo.greeting:
Greetings,
I am the CEO of Ducksung Techpack Co., Ltd.

Since our founding in 1996, we have been a leading MRO specialist, delivering all the materials your production sites need quickly and accurately.

We will continue to upgrade our digital procurement system and expand our domestic and overseas supply networks so that our customers can focus on their core business.

We sincerely appreciate your continued support.

mro.title: What is MRO?
mro.subtitle: Maintenance, Repair & Operations — consumable materials not directly used in production
mro.definition: MRO (Maintenance, Repair & Operations) refers to consumable materials and services used indirectly in a company's production and operations. Unlike direct materials (raw materials), MRO items are purchased frequently and in diverse categories, making integrated management challenging.

hero.title: Dedicated Supply for Hospitals & Medical Institutions
hero.subtitle: Stable delivery services tailored to the demands of medical environments, backed by 26 years of MRO experience.

about.title: What is NSO?
about.subtitle: Non-Stock Order — rapid procurement on demand, without inventory burden
about.desc: NSO (Non-Stock Order) is a method of stably supplying consumable materials needed by hospitals and medical institutions on demand, without inventory burden. Ducksung Techpack understands the unique needs of medical environments and supports both urgent and scheduled deliveries.

items.title: Supply Items
items.subtitle: We supply all consumables needed in medical environments.

categories.title: Hygiene & Sanitation
categories.desc: Hand sanitizers, disinfectants, hygiene wipes, sanitary bags

categories.title: Packaging
categories.desc: Sterile packaging, medical waste bags, specimen containers

categories.title: Office & Admin
categories.desc: Prescription paper, labels, envelopes, print paper

categories.title: Ward Supplies
categories.desc: Pillowcases, sheets, patient gowns, towels and linen
